name: Instagram
description: Instagram is a photo and video sharing social network. The Graph API allows agents to read user profiles, fetch media posts, publish photos and videos, manage comments, retrieve engagement insights, discover hashtags and mentions for business and creator accounts.

capabilities.name: user_profile_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the authenticated Instagram user's profile information including username, bio, follower count, and media count.

capabilities.name: user_media_list
capabilities.description: Fetch a paginated list of media posts (photos, videos, carousels) published by the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: media_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific media object including caption, media type, permalink, and timestamp.

capabilities.name: media_children_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the individual items within a carousel album media post.

capabilities.name: photo_publish
capabilities.description: Publish a photo to the authenticated user's Instagram feed by providing an image URL and optional caption.

capabilities.name: reel_publish
capabilities.description: Publish a reel (short video) to the authenticated user's Instagram feed.

capabilities.name: carousel_publish
capabilities.description: Publish a carousel post (multiple images/videos) to the authenticated user's Instagram feed.

capabilities.name: media_container_create
capabilities.description: Create a media container for content publishing. This is the first step in the two-step publishing process.

capabilities.name: media_publish
capabilities.description: Publish a previously created media container to the user's Instagram feed.

capabilities.name: media_comments_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve comments on a specific media post, including commenter username and comment text.

capabilities.name: comment_reply
capabilities.description: Post a reply to a specific comment on one of the authenticated user's media posts.

capabilities.name: comment_hide
capabilities.description: Hide or unhide a comment on one of the authenticated user's media posts.

capabilities.name: comment_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a comment on one of the authenticated user's media posts.

capabilities.name: media_insights_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve engagement metrics (impressions, reach, likes, comments, saves, shares) for a specific media post on a business or creator account.

capabilities.name: user_insights_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve account-level insights (impressions, reach, follower count, profile views) for a business or creator account over a time period.

capabilities.name: hashtag_search
capabilities.description: Search for a hashtag by name and retrieve its ID for use in fetching recent or top media.

capabilities.name: hashtag_recent_media_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve recent media posts tagged with a specific hashtag.

capabilities.name: hashtag_top_media_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve top-performing media posts tagged with a specific hashtag.

capabilities.name: mentions_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve media posts that mention or tag the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: stories_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of currently active stories published by the authenticated user.
